subcodes.first_line: Say: O ye that croak! This is the Day of God; naught is seen therein save His Truth and His signs this day [3.5s]... ...This is the Day which past ages and centuries can never rival. Know this, and be not of the ignorant
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ای ناعقین این یوم یوم الله است در او دیده نمیشود جز حق و آثارش امروز
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
